item.title: Version 1.5.5
item.description:
🚀 What's New in 1.5.5

📚 Book Tracking & Coverage Analytics

  • Physical Book Management: You can now define the total page count for a Subject. This acts as the "Source of Truth" for your physical curriculum.
  • Coverage Gap Analysis: Added a new "Book Coverage" dashboard card. It calculates the exact percentage of the book mapped to your syllabus and shows precisely how many pages are "left" or "overflowing."
  • Visual Progress: Integrated a linear progress bar into the coverage card for an immediate visual sense of curriculum completion.

✍️ Enhanced Editors & Validation

  • Intelligent Page Warnings: The Chapter Editor now cross-references your subject's total pages. If you attempt to add a chapter range that exceeds the book's capacity, the system triggers a confirmation warning.
  • Subject Metadata: Redesigned Subject cards in the management screen to elegantly display both the Publisher and Page Count using modern dual-label tags.

🛠️ Bug Fixes & Stability

  • Layout Engine Fix: Resolved a critical "RenderBox was not laid out" crash in the Syllabus Stats grid affecting both Mobile and Desktop views.
  • UI Kit Synchronization: Fixed a parameter mismatch in TigleDualLabelTag and updated TigleStatCard to better handle dynamic rich-text metrics.
  • Resolved an issue where page range alignments caused hasSize assertion failures during layout rebuilds.
